title: Moderna Flu Vaccine Wins Unanimous FDA Advisory Panel Support
headline: FDA advisory committee unanimously endorses Moderna's mRNA flu vaccine after earlier refusing to review it, positioning the company for potential approval.
key_facts: Unanimous FDA advisory panel vote; earlier 2026 FDA refused to review; FDA staff had highlighted data shortcomings; Thursday June 18 panel meeting

title: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton to Step Down in August
headline: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton announces departure in August 2026 for a role outside the pharmaceutical industry.
key_facts: Departure planned for August 2026; leaving pharma industry; successor search underway

title: Eli Lilly Cuts 340B Drug Discounts to Hospitals Over Data Dispute
headline: Eli Lilly reduces 340B program drug discounts to hospitals that failed to provide required claims data.
key_facts: 340B program discount cuts; data policy dispute; hospitals failed to provide claims data

title: Biogen Acquires RayThera for Up to $1 Billion
headline: Biogen acquires secretive anti-inflammatory biotech RayThera in deal valued at up to $1 billion.
key_facts: Deal value: up to $1 billion; RayThera anti-inflammatory/immune drug startup

title: Jazz Pharma Partners with AbCellera on T Cell Engagers
headline: Jazz Pharmaceuticals and AbCellera collaborate on T cell engagers targeting GI cancers in potentially $4.1 billion deal.
key_facts: Deal value: up to $4.1 billion; T cell engagers for GI cancers; broadening beyond blood cancers

title: Kardigan IPO Raises $400 Million
headline: Kardigan raises $400 million in IPO, extending biotech's strong capital markets momentum with five of six largest offerings since 2022.
key_facts: $400 million IPO; 2026 IPO class includes five of six largest biotech offerings since start of 2022

title: Novo Nordisk Hacked — $25M Ransom Demanded
headline: Hackers claim access to Novo Nordisk drug formulations and AI models, demanding $25 million ransom that company reportedly did not pay.
key_facts: $25 million ransom demand; Novo did not pay; hackers claim drug recipes and AI models; data reportedly for sale

title: GSK and Spero Oral UTI Treatment Approved by FDA
headline: FDA approves GSK and Spero's oral treatment for complicated urinary tract infections.
key_facts: FDA approval for complicated UTIs; oral treatment; June 17, 2026

title: Lilly Acquires 4E Therapeutics for Non-Opioid Pain
headline: Eli Lilly acquires non-opioid pain drug developer 4E Therapeutics as part of $18+ billion acquisition spree.
key_facts: Acquisition of 4E Therapeutics; non-opioid pain focus; part of $18B+ acquisition spree over past few years

title: cAMPfield Launches with $180M for Gut Disease Drugs
headline: cAMPfield launches with $180 million in funding to develop gut disease therapeutics.
key_facts: $180 million funding; gut disease drug focus

title: Vedana Therapeutics Emerges with $46M for Migraine
headline: Vedana Therapeutics emerges from stealth with $46 million to develop anti-PACAP migraine therapies backed by Westlake.
key_facts: $46 million funding; anti-PACAP migraine therapies; Westlake backing

title: Aurobindo Must Divest 4 Drugs to Complete Lannett Buyout
headline: FTC requires Aurobindo to divest 4 drugs to complete acquisition of Lannett.
key_facts: FTC-mandated divestiture of 4 drugs; Lannett acquisition condition; June 18, 2026

title: Merck's Capvaxive Receives FDA Label Expansion
headline: FDA approves label expansion for Merck's pneumococcal vaccine Capvaxive.

title: UniQure to File Gene Therapy for FDA Approval
headline: UniQure plans to file gene therapy for FDA approval, reflecting major shifts in regulatory strategy.
key_facts: Gene therapy filing planned; reflecting major FDA shifts

title: Neumora Stops Depression Program
headline: Neumora discontinues depression treatment program launched by ARCH.

title: Edgewise Heart Drug Passes Key Trial Test
headline: Edgewise heart disease drug passes key trial but results leave differentiation somewhat unclear.

title: Cambrian's Longevity Drug Mimics Exercise
headline: Cambrian's experimental longevity drug reportedly mimics exercise effects.
